architectureNotes: Image GO (widget name 'Image GO', dataType 'graphicOrganizerImageHotSpot') is an ELEMENT, NOT an assessment widget. 'graphicOrganizerImageHotSpot' is absent from support/module-setup.ts ASSESSMENT_DATA_TYPES, so resolveDropTarget routes it to the canvas — it drops onto the Instructions-for-Students page (#desktop_view) via cy.dropComponent('graphicOrganizerImageHotSpot') (dropComponent matches the catalog widget by name OR dataType), not into a Generic Step column.
Canvas wrapper is .graphicOrganizerContainer.graphicOrganizerImageHotSpot.component-holder (attr graphic-organizer-template). Base image is #goImage.

'+ Add HotSpot' is button.hotspotBtn → scope.addHotSpot pushes a hotspot object onto fieldData.settings.inputBox; each hotspot renders as .inputDiv.hotspotDiv{n} with .hotspotTextarea (contenteditable, ng-model hotspot.inputAnswer), delete icon .hotspotTextarea-delete.icon-Delete (scope.deleteTextarea splices inputBox) and move handle .labelDiv-Drag-Icon.icon-Move. New-hotspot defaults: bgColor #FEFFFF, outlineColor #1E1E1E, height 10%, width 25%. Hotspots are DOM-assertable (add/delete/input).

Settings panel root is .graphic-organizer-setting.imgLabel (title 'Graphic Organizer', icon .icon-Image-labelling_number-01). It has NO unique id (unlike #text-settings-panel / #shortLongAns-setting) so selectors are class-scoped.

Show Label Type (#label-visibility, ng-model currSettings.isLabelTypeIamge) reveals Primary/Secondary radios; the question label fields (.questionNoText/.questionNoSecondaryText) render on the canvas only when isLabelTypeIamge.

Per-hotspot 'Text Input' settings (showTextSetting) render only after a hotspot is selected via scope.showSetting (click a hotspot textarea): Lock for Student, Input Answer, Header Label, Character Limit checkbox + number (number input is ng-disabled until the checkbox is checked), Apply for all Input, Background / Outline colour swatches (.bgr-style), Enable Advanced Formatting (#isjoditEnabled), Alt Text (maxlength 2000). The spec guards each of these with a body-presence check and logs+returns gracefully when the form is not mounted.

Base-image upload (#upload-comp-img uploadfiles) and the Replace Image button use the media/OS picker — control presence is automated, file selection is deferred. Hotspot drag/move + resize are jQuery-UI runtime behaviours (deferred).

QC TC_01–TC_03, TC_06–TC_13, TC_28 are login/activity/step-wizard bootstrap (handled by the harness, not the Image GO element). The bulk of the catalog (TC_40–TC_77) covers Save, Preview, Reader, Publish, Instructor evaluation, persistence-after-reload and a11y — all outside the authoring DOM and deferred (it.skip with reasons).
